data.title: Home Depot names a new CTO
data.description: Franziska Bell comes to Home Depot's CTO role with a background in AI and technology from Ford, BP and Uber.

data.title: Visa adds AI tools for dispute resolution
data.description: It called disputes "one of the most persistent friction points in commerce" in announcing the new tools. The new suite of tools arrive as Visa continues to invest in agentic AI-powered payments.

data.title: Allbirds to be sold for $39 million
data.description: American Exchange Group would become Allbirds' new owner as the footwear and apparel brand ends a difficult period as a public company.

data.title: Retailers sign on for Firmly agentic commerce platform
data.description: Firmly said its platform "autonomously integrates with a merchant’s systems and runs automated testing to validate the integration, removing the need for engineering effort on the merchant side."

data.title: ProVendorConnect launches B2B marketplace for property managers
data.description: The platform allows property managers and HOA boards to post tenders, define scope and review bids.
